method_notes: Three polls recovered from Korean news snippets: (1) MBC bilateral head-to-head fielded ~Jan 21-22 2026 (pre-Lunar-New-Year, imnews.imbc.com); (2) Jowon C&I multi-candidate poll for Straight News fielded ~Mar 5-8 2026, published Mar 11 (jjctv.co.kr); (3) KSOI/CBS bilateral fielded Apr 22-23 2026 post-nomination, n=1001 (magazine.hankyung.com). NESDC direct access and individual article fetches consistently timed out; Nov-Dec 2025 and May 2026 are unrepresented. Jowon C&I is a multi-candidate preference poll while MBC and KSOI are bilateral head-to-heads, so cross-series p comparisons are approximate.
